name: 1.5bu Laundry Basket White - Brightroom™: Large Portable Clothes Hamper with Built-In Handles, 52.8L Capacity
description: The 1.5 Bushel Laundry Basket features a classic design, and is a great solution that satisfies common laundry needs throughout the home. This basket includes a flat, reinforced rim on all four sides that provides ease when lifting and carrying through doorways, hallways, and up & down stairs. The large, rectangular hole pattern increases air flow for added ventilation. Its durable design will hold up to your regular day-to-day use, while the smooth plastic interior is snag proof and easy to clean. Ideal for use in the bedroom, bathroom, laundry room or for transporting clothes between locations. When not in use, the laundry baskets stack neatly and nest together creating more efficient storage space in your home. The overall assembled dimensions of this item are 24 1/4" L x 17 3/8" W x 10 1/4" H.
